messages.text: ocean vibes you cant scare me off that easy
you typed that way too fast to be calm
look at you pretending you don’t care
you talk big, can you back it
you keep powering the convo you claim to hate
your ego and i are besties now
you play hard to get like it’s a sport
drinks tuesday. i'm choosing the place
not bad i'll give you that
